cmdailyTasksThemes: Defines named themes used to categorise daily tasks within a company/location. Referenced by cmdailyTasks and clientGoals.
cmEmployeePositions: Defines staff position/role types within a company, with flags for admin, residential care, and non-care roles. Referenced by carer and cmCarerContract.
cmEthnicity: Lookup table of ethnicity options available within a company/location, used in client profiling. Referenced by clientDetails.
cmExpenses: Records individual expense transactions for clients or carers, including amount, category, billing and pay flags, payroll lock status, and statutory leave linkage. Related to client, carer, and timesheets.
cmExpensesAdhoc: Defines recurring ad-hoc expense rules applied automatically to clients over an effective date range by job type and frequency. Related to client.
cmExpensesAdv: Defines top-level advanced expense categories with funding category codes. Referenced by cmExpensesAdvSub1.
cmExpensesAdvSub1: Defines first-level subcategories of advanced expenses, linked to a parent cmExpensesAdv entry. Referenced by cmExpensesAdvSub2.
cmExpensesAdvSub2: Defines second-level subcategories of advanced expenses with dual parent references. Related to cmExpensesAdv and cmExpensesAdvSub1.
cmExpensesExtended: Stores additional metadata for expense records, including prescribed item flag and loan details. Related to cmExpenses.
cmExpensesFile: Stores file attachments (receipts, documents) linked to expense records for clients or carers. Related to client and carer.
cmExpensesRecurr: Defines recurring expense rules applied on a cycle to included/excluded carers or clients over an effective date range. Related to location and job type.
cmExpensesType: Defines expense type categories with rules for paying carers, billing clients, taxing, wallet transactions, and app visibility. Referenced by cmExpenses.
cmExpensesWrap: Defines WRAP expense codes used in advanced expense categorisation. Standalone lookup table.
cmExpenseTimesheets: Defines rules for automatically generating expenses based on timesheet criteria such as duration, job type, carer position, and overnight flag. Related to company and location.
cmFamily: Stores family member portal accounts with login credentials, allowing family access to client information. Related to cmFamilyConnection.
cmFamilyConnection: Links family portal accounts to specific clients with activation and link code tracking. Related to cmFamily and client.
cmFormListName: Defines named form templates available within a company/location, with visibility, scoring, and area settings. Referenced by cmFormStructure and cmFormsTaken.
cmFormQuestion: Defines individual form questions with type, category, and area settings. Referenced by cmFormQuestionAnswers and cmFormsAnswers.
cmFormQuestionAnswers: Defines the selectable answer options for a form question, including score, outcome, and alert level. Related to cmFormQuestion.
cmFormQuestionAnswerTable: Defines column headers for table-type form questions. Related to cmFormQuestion.
cmFormQuestionPicture: Stores image files attached to form questions. Related to cmFormQuestion.
cmFormsAnswers: Records submitted answers for a completed form instance, including score and answering party. Related to cmFormsTaken and cmFormQuestion.
cmFormsAnswersTable: Records table-format answers submitted for a form instance, with up to seven column values. Related to cmFormsTaken and cmFormQuestion.
cmFormsAnswersUpdated: Audit history of updated form answers, preserving prior values after edits. Related to cmFormsTaken.
cmFormsOpenAnswers: Stores open-ended form answers that can be closed or locked, supporting ongoing or evolving responses. Related to cmFormsTaken and cmFormQuestion.
cmFormsOpenAnswersTable: Stores open-ended table-format form answers with close and lock support. Related to cmFormsTaken.
cmFormsPic: Stores references to images uploaded as part of a form answer. Related to cmFormsTaken.
cmFormsPlansTaken: Records completed care plan instances for clients, linking the plan, carer, review date, and archive status. Related to cmPlans, client, and carer.
cmFormsPlansUpdated: Audit history of care plan instance updates, capturing changes to review dates and completion status. Related to cmFormsPlansTaken.
cmFormsSignOff: Stores digital signature data and signer details for form or plan sign-off events. Related to cmFormsTaken.
cmFormsTaken: Records each instance of a form being completed for a client, linking to the plan, carer, and close status. Related to cmFormsPlansTaken and client.
cmFormStructure: Defines the order and inclusion of questions within a named form. Related to cmFormListName and cmFormQuestion.
cmFrequency: Lookup table of named frequency options used in recurring expense and task scheduling. Referenced by cmExpensesAdhoc.
cmFutureConflicts: Logs detected scheduling conflicts between two overlapping recurring visits for the same carer. Related to carer and client.
cmFutureStatusChange: Schedules automatic client status/state transitions on future dates, with rollback support and reason tracking. Related to client.
cmFutureStatusChangeCarer: Schedules automatic carer status/state transitions on future dates. Related to carer.
cmFutureStatusReason: Lookup table of named reasons for scheduled status changes, applicable to client or carer side. Referenced by cmFutureStatusChange and cmFutureStatusChangeCarer.
cmHelp: Stores in-app help articles and video links with admin level access control. Referenced by cmHelpViewed.
cmHelpViewed: Tracks which help videos have been viewed by which users. Related to cmHelp and carer.
cmHolidayRejectedReason: Lookup table of reasons for rejecting holiday requests. Referenced by cmHolidayRequests.
cmHolidayRequests: Records leave and holiday requests submitted by carers, including dates, type, request status, and action taken. Related to carer.
cmHoursRejectedReason: Lookup table of reasons for rejecting timesheet hours requests. Referenced by cmHoursRequests.
cmHoursRequests: Records carer requests to change or confirm scheduled hours for a visit, with approval workflow and rejection reasons. Related to carer, client, and adminRecurr.
cmHoursRequestsClosedStatus: Lookup table of closed status labels for hours requests. Referenced by cmHoursRequests.
cmInterTravelDetails: Records inter-visit travel sessions for carers, including total distance, pay, and confirmation status. Related to carer, client, and timesheets.
cmInterTravelDetailsAddresses: Stores individual address waypoints within an inter-travel journey. Related to cmInterTravelDetails.
cmInterTravelDetailsItems: Stores individual travel legs within an inter-travel journey, with start/end locations and pay values. Related to cmInterTravelDetails.
cmInvoiceAmazonStorage: Records filenames and invoice IDs for invoices stored in Amazon S3. Related to company and location.
cmInvoiceCycle: Lookup table of named invoice cycle types for billing configuration. Referenced by clientDetails.
cmInvoiceDetails: Stores generated invoice header records with full company, client, and period metadata, including credit note and recalculation linkage. Related to client and area.
cmInvoiceDetails24022021: Historical snapshot of invoice header records as of February 2021, preserved for audit purposes. Related to client.
cmInvoiceDetailsItems: Stores individual line items within an invoice, including timesheet, expense, and credit entries with billing, pay, travel, and split values. Related to cmInvoiceDetails, client, and carer.
cmInvoiceDetailsItemsSummary: Stores summarised billing totals per job type for an invoice. Related to cmInvoiceDetails.
cmInvoiceDetailsRecalculate: Logs invoice recalculation events with before/after billing and pay values per job type. Related to client and cmInvoiceDetails.
cmInvoiceEmail: Stores emailed invoice records with access tokens and last-viewed timestamps for client portal links. Related to client and cmInvoiceDetails.
cmInvoicePaymentReceived: Records payments received against invoices, with source and comment. Related to cmInvoiceDetails.
cmInvoicePaymentSource: Lookup table of named payment sources for invoice payments. Referenced by cmInvoicePaymentReceived.
cmInvoiceRecord: Legacy invoice summary records with totals, hours, payment status, and print dates. Related to client.
cmInvoiceSpecialDay: Defines billing rate multipliers for specific calendar dates by job type. Related to company and location.
cmInvoiceTemplates: Defines invoice layout templates with column configuration, display options, VAT, footer text, and bank details. Referenced by cmInvoiceDetails.
cmInvoiceTemplatesColumns: Defines the available column types and field mappings for invoice templates. Referenced by cmInvoiceTemplates.
cmInvoiceType: Lookup table of named invoice types available within a company/location. Referenced by cmInvoiceRecord.
cmJobtypeReportingCategory: Defines reporting category codes for job types, used in Australian billing exports. Related to company and location.
cmLevelAccess: Controls which branches and workgroups a carer/admin can access within a company. Related to carer.
cmLevelAreaWorkgroup: Maps areas to workgroups within a company/location. Related to area and cmLevelWorkgroup.
cmLevelBranch: Defines named branch-level organisational units with capacity and default invoice template. Referenced by cmLevelWorkgroupBranch.
cmLevelWorkgroup: Defines named workgroup-level organisational units within a company/location, with Sage and X3 integration codes. Referenced by cmLevelAreaWorkgroup and cmLevelWorkgroupBranch.
cmLevelWorkgroupBranch: Maps workgroups to branches within a company/location. Related to cmLevelWorkgroup and cmLevelBranch.
cmLogCareApp: Logs page visit durations within the care app for usage analytics. Related to carer.
cmMultipleQualifications: Stores additional file attachments for qualification records that support multiple documents. Related to cmQualifications.
cmMultipleQualificationsArchive: Stores additional file attachments for archived qualification records. Related to cmQualificationsArchive.
cmNoticeboardAssign: Assigns noticeboard messages to specific carers or areas, with seen and expiry tracking. Related to carer and cmNoticeboardMessage.
cmNoticeboardCategory: Lookup table of named categories for noticeboard messages. Referenced by cmNoticeboardMessage.
cmNoticeboardMessage: Stores noticeboard messages with expiry dates, area targeting, and template flags. Related to cmNoticeboardCategory and cmNoticeboardAssign.
cmNoticeboardSeen: Records which carers have seen or hidden a noticeboard message. Related to cmNoticeboardMessage.
cmNotificationsCategory: Lookup table of notification type categories used for classifying system notifications. Standalone.
cmNumbers: Snapshots daily counts of clients or carers by status, state, and permission level for reporting dashboards. Related to company and location.
cmPainAssessment: Records pain assessment entries for clients, including location, intensity, description, and treatment notes. Related to client.
cmPayPeriodPersonInCharge: Assigns a person in charge to a specific pay period and branch. Related to cmPayPeriods.
cmPayPeriods: Defines payroll periods with start/end dates, pay date, and tax week/year reference. Referenced by cmPayPeriodPersonInCharge.
cmPayrollCycle: Lookup table of named payroll cycle types. Referenced by carer and contract settings.
cmPayrollDetails: Stores generated payroll header records for carers, with period, area, travel deduction, and statutory pay totals. Related to carer and area.
cmPayrollDetailsItems: Stores individual payroll line items including timesheets, expenses, leave, and travel, with pay rates and NI values. Related to cmPayrollDetails, carer, and client.
cmPayrollJobtypeGroupItems: Links job types to a payroll job type group. Related to cmPayrollJobtypeGroupName.
cmPayrollJobtypeGroupName: Defines named groupings of job types for payroll reporting. Referenced by cmPayrollJobtypeGroupItems.
cmPayrollTemplate: Defines payroll slip display templates controlling which sections and fields are shown. Referenced by cmPayrollDetails.
cmPlanAppend: Records forms appended to a care plan instance after initial completion. Related to cmFormsPlansTaken.
cmPlanCategories: Defines named categories for organising care plans, with colour coding and user-side visibility. Referenced by cmPlans.
cmPlans: Defines care plan templates with metadata including version, review dates, visibility, and area/location scope. Referenced by cmFormsPlansTaken and cmPlanStructure.
cmPlansAnnonymised: Stores anonymised tokenised links for sharing care plans externally with expiring URLs. Related to client and cmPlans.
cmPlansAnnonymisedAccess: Logs access events to anonymised plan links. Related to cmPlansAnnonymised.
cmPlanStructure: Defines the ordered list of forms within a care plan template. Related to cmPlans and cmFormListName.
cmPositionQualifications: Links required qualifications to staff positions. Related to cmEmployeePositions and cmQualificationsType.
cmPrivateNotes: Stores private notes written about clients or carers, visible only to authorised users. Related to client and carer.
cmQualifications: Records carer qualification instances with award/expiry dates, file references, outcome, and archive status. Related to carer and cmQualificationsType.
cmQualificationsArchive: Archives superseded qualification records for audit purposes. Related to carer and cmQualificationsType.
cmQualificationsOutcome: Lookup table of named outcomes for qualification assessments. Referenced by cmQualifications.
cmQualificationsPending: Staging table for carer qualification submissions awaiting approval. Related to carer and cmQualificationsType.
cmQualificationsSuperTags: Maps groups of qualification types to a super-tag, used for aggregated compliance reporting. Related to location and company.
cmQualificationsType: Defines qualification types with default validity length, colour, alert thresholds, and app update permissions. Referenced by cmQualifications and cmPositionQualifications.
